title: thinopyrum elongatum
intro: Thinopyrum elongatum, also known as blue wildrye, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of saponins and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Thinopyrum elongatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, with herbal preparations often used to treat various health issues, including wounds and gastrointestinal problems.
